src.transformations: Session 51 hotfix — demote 17 false-positive r:place tags (numerals 1-6, stopwords new/other/city/bay/island/region, abbreviations te/mt/st, garbage tokens (nz)/4 nz). Restore each to its v1.1.2 role.
src.notes: v1.2.0 Channel A over-promoted any token whose parent attribute list contained region/district/boat location, catching numerals and generic kinds. Hotfix is a targeted revert of the 17 bad entries; the other 480 genuine place elevations and 16 lane elevations are preserved.
